meaning: n.蜿醍函菴懃畑荵倶ｺｺ謌也黄,蟾･菴應ｹ倶ｺｺ謌也黄adj.蜉ｨ菴懃噪
examples: To train a rat, the experimenter placed it in an operant conditioning chamber: a small plastic box with a lever at one end.
Operant conditioning occurs all throughout games.
You need to train a pig and you need to do so through operant conditioning.
Per Batton, operant conditioning plays a hand in game design which filmmaking cannot replicate.
